rationale: Educ. Code §31.1012 concerns school district reporting of instructional materials costs. It has no relation to homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal values.
quote: Each school district shall annually report to the agency information regarding the instructional materials used by the district during the previous school year, including the cost of each material, to assist the agency in ensuring compliance with Section 31.151(a).
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
